dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4283 IS: Public Health and Bio-Preparedness Workforce Loan Repayment Reauthorization Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Baldwin (for herself and Ms. Collins) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions

form.official-title: To amend the Public Health Service Act to reauthorize a public health and bio-preparedness workforce loan repayment program.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Public Health and Bio-Preparedness Workforce Loan Repayment Reauthorization Act of 2026.

section.header: Reauthorization of Public Health and Bio-Preparedness Workforce Loan Repayment Program
section.text: Section 776(i) of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 295f–1(i)) is amended by striking fiscal years 2023 through 2025 and inserting fiscal years 2027 through 2031.
